content: Official Supabase SSR documentation installs @supabase/supabase-js and @supabase/ssr, uses separate browser and server clients with cookie adapters, requires a Next.js Proxy for refresh, uses getClaims for authorization, and reserves getSession for retrieving tokens such as forwarding an access token to another service. Registry metadata pairs @supabase/ssr 0.12.3 with @supabase/supabase-js ^2.110.5; 2.110.7 satisfies it and requires Node >=22.
